title: xyris aurea
intro: Xyris aurea, also known as the golden yellow-eyed grass, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Xyridaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation. The health benefits of Xyris aurea include its potential to aid in the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
